title: Credential
description: A credential (passkey) is the public-private key pair that belongs to an identity in Beyond Identity.

id.description: A unique identifier for a credential. Automatically generated on creation. Immutable and read-only. Unique within the realm.

identity_id.description: A unique identifier for the credential's identity. Automatically set on creation. Immutable and read-only.

realm_id.description: A unique identifier for the credential's realm. Automatically set on creation. Immutable and read-only.

tenant_id.description: A unique identifier for the credential's tenant. Automatically set on creation. Immutable and read-only.

state.description: Current state of the credential. ACTIVE = can authenticate; REVOKED = cannot authenticate.

csr_type.description: Type of certificate signing request that created this credential. JWT = delivered as a JWT; WEBAUTHN = delivered as a WebAuthn attestation response; FIDO2 = FIDO2 WebAuthn Level 2 attestation.

jwk_json.description: The public key of the Credential in JWK format (RFC-7517). Immutable and read-only.

jwk_thumbprint.description: Base64 URL encoding of the JWK thumbprint of the public key (RFC-7638). Immutable and read-only.

create_time.description: ISO8601 combined date and time representing when the credential was created. Read-only.
